description_long: This is a sleek, modern military-style airplane with a sharply angular, stealth-inspired design. The fuselage is predominantly matte black, with broad, swept-back wings that feature round insignia near the tips. The nose is sharply pointed, and the cockpit is set forward with a tinted canopy, suggesting a single-seat configuration. Twin jet engine exhausts are visible at the rear, integrated into the body for reduced radar signature. The landing gear is deployed, with a single nose wheel and main gear under the wings. The overall appearance is aggressive and aerodynamic, optimized for high-speed flight and maneuverability.
description: A matte black, stealth-inspired military airplane with swept-back wings, twin rear jet exhausts, and a forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and angular intakes beneath the fuselage.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the low, swept-back wings, deployed landing gear, and streamlined fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals twin jet exhausts, angular tail surfaces, and insignia on the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the landing gear and wing shape.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with slight anhedral angle and no visible winglets; broad chord and integrated control surfaces.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with canted outward configuration, no conventional horizontal stabilizer visible.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with single nose wheel and two main gear units, appears retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a tinted canopy integrated into the fuselage.
